title: I am 52 years old already at retirement age yet I still want to make one last push to reach my goal of 10 million
author: Ok-Basil2753
selftext:
for a very long time no matter how relentlessly I worked I felt as though I was making absolutely no headway watching others achieve success and renown while I remained stuck in the same spot year after year was truly an agonizing experience

I do not come from a privileged background I had no shortcuts available to me nor did I ever encounter that kind of manna from heaven luck that allows one to gain something for nothing all I did was persist in my learning constantly refine my strategies and after every stumble pick myself up and try again eventually I met the most important person in my life a mentor who reached out a helping hand and provided me with invaluable assistance

the content of our study group is highly systematic covering topics such as: the critical breakout points of ascending triangles (validated by trading volume) double top and double bottom patterns flag patterns signal confirmation via ATR volatility contraction and multi cycle trend confirmation using 5-day 13-day 34-day and 55-day moving averages thereby providing a comprehensive market perspective across short medium and long timeframes

this study group is completely free of charge and I sincerely hope it proves beneficial to you my sole intention is to pass on the opportunities that once helped me escape my own predicament to those friends who currently feel lost or helpless

If you feel that your trading lacks structure or has fallen into disarray or if you simply wish to find a rational focused environment to discuss market conditions please feel free to send me a private message or leave a comment below I would be delighted to invite you to join our community

finally I wish you all the very best in achieving financial freedom and enjoying a happy fulfilling life

replies.author: Ok-Basil2753
replies.body: I m glad I could help I ve sent it to you

replies.author: Upstairs-Cricket-169
replies.body: If ur 19 with 50k you’ll more than surpass it even go the safe routes😂 you’ll have over a million with no more contributions ever! You’re killing it!

replies.author: FrameFar7262
replies.body: Haha thanks ! Yea i’ve been putting my money in my wealth simple account and I don’t touch it

replies.author: Upstairs-Cricket-169
replies.body: This is what I wish I would’ve known when I was ur age! Instead I chose to buy McDonald’s every day😂 keep pushing bro! Even when it feels slow you’ll have so much freedom and will never be tied to a job you hate already!!

replies.author: Ok-Basil2753
replies.body: I m glad I could help I ve sent it to you

replies.author: Ok-Basil2753
replies.body: I have received it I hope this helps you

comments.author: SetSenior4264
comments.body: Whatever you're sending people, I want some too

replies.author: Ok-Basil2753
replies.body: Of course I have already sent it to you

replies.author: TheKillerScope
replies.body: Send it this was as well please.
